signals.message: M1 Design System — PASSED. Reviewed all deliverables: (1) design-system.md in .shared/memory — complete with color tokens, typography, spacing, shadows, motion, glassmorphism, and component state reference. (2) component-spec-clip-card.md — complete with props, states, anatomy, Tailwind classes, accessibility. (3) component-spec-coaching-screen.md — complete with layout, panel specs, phase progression, responsive breakpoints. (4) component-spec-feedback-card.md — complete with score ring, breakdown bars, AI tips, loading states. Phase gate met: design-system.md + 3 component specs delivered. Tester sign-off granted.

M2 Data Pipeline v1 — PASSED with condition. Reviewed all deliverables: (1) clips-seed.json — 15 clips covering all 5 skills × 3 difficulties, each with full metadata (scene description, annotations, difficulty scoring, context notes). (2) prisma-schema.prisma — Clip, Annotation, UserSession models with correct field types, indices, and cascade deletes. (3) pipeline-checkpoint.json — pipeline status documented. CONDITION: 15 YouTube video IDs are marked NEEDS_VERIFICATION. Must be verified before database seed. Tester sign-off granted conditional on YouTube ID verification pass.
signals.condition: YouTube video IDs must be verified before DB seed; structure and curation approved

signals.message: prisma/seed.ts is now ready for tester review. It includes a safety guard: refuses to run if any youtube_video_id is still NEEDS_VERIFICATION. Also added Zod validation schemas (schemas.ts) for all data types. When YouTube IDs are verified, please run: npx tsx prisma/seed.ts and confirm all 15 clips seed successfully.

M2 tester condition CLEARED. All 15 YouTube video IDs have been verified via YouTube Data API v3. clips-seed.json updated — zero NEEDS_VERIFICATION entries remain. Bad matches were corrected (clip_002 Social Network deposition, clip_009 Marriage Story fight, clip_011 Any Given Sunday locker room speech, clip_013 Legally Blonde Elle Wins). 3 clips with duration mismatches had timestamps adjusted. The M2 condition for full sign-off is now met. DB seed can proceed once DATABASE_URL is configured.

Three fixes applied — please review before M6 tester sign-off. (1) CRITICAL — GPT-4o Vision bug: feedback/route.ts was sending a .webm video URL to Vision API, which only accepts images. Fixed: RecordClient now captures JPEG frames via Canvas during recording, sessions/route.ts uploads them to Vercel Blob, feedback/route.ts uses frameUrls array for Vision. Schema change: `frameUrls String? @db.Text` added to UserSession — run `npm run db:push` to apply. (2) 3-2-1 countdown: RecordClient.tsx now has `countdown` state. 'Start Recording' triggers 3→2→1 overlay at 800ms/tick before recording starts. (3) Split view: confirmed already implemented in record/page.tsx — YouTube left, webcam right. P0 #1 was not a regression.
